description: Multi-gate validation framework for progressive quality assurance

evals.prompt: How do I set up a validation pipeline with the 10-gate system?
evals.expected_output: Validation pipeline configuration with all 10 gates in sequence
assertions: Includes gate configuration (syntax, lint, tests, security, performance, integration, docs, deps, size, final)

evals.prompt: How do I configure the syntax validation gate?
evals.expected_output: Syntax gate configuration for TypeScript/JavaScript compilation

evals.prompt: How do I add security scanning to the validation pipeline?
evals.expected_output: Security gate configuration with vulnerability levels
assertions: Shows ignore patterns for false positives

evals.prompt: How do I interpret and handle validation gate results?
evals.expected_output: Validation result processing with pass/fail determination
assertions: Mentions gates array with individual results

evals.prompt: How do I set up conditional gates that only run when needed?
evals.expected_output: Conditional gate configuration with runIf function
